title: cyclosorus nitidus
intro: Cyclosorus nitidus, also known as the glossy maiden fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family wood-sorrel family that belongs to the genus Cyclosorus. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus nitidus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, lower blood pressure, and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves can be used as a tea, tincture, or dried extract to harness its medicinal properties.
